nl_query: Show all exam schedules that have at least one bundle created but no answer scripts registered, indicating a potential data synchronization gap between the scanning team and the evaluation system.
failed_sql:
SELECT esc.exam_id, esc.course_id, esc.exam_date, esc.exam_type
FROM   exam_schedule_cache esc
JOIN   bundle b ON b.exam_id = esc.exam_id
WHERE  b.status = 'OPEN'
  AND  esc.status <> 'COMPLETE'
  AND  NOT EXISTS (
         SELECT 1 FROM answer_script a WHERE a.exam_id = esc.exam_id
       )
ORDER  BY esc.exam_date DESC
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): exam_schedule_cache.status. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
